Title: User Feedback on Application Rating
Test Steps:
1. Verify the average rating of the application is 4.4/5.
2. Confirm that 12 out of 13 interviewees believe the application can add value to neighborhood life.
3. Check if the majority of interviewees appreciate the ability to share Points of the Quarter with others.
4. Validate that the graphical interface is considered good by most interviewees.
5. Ensure that users aged 60+ who have prior knowledge of smartphones and applications find it easy to register, access, and use the application.
Expected Result:
1. The application has an average rating of 4.4/5.
2. 12 out of 13 interviewees agree that the application can add value to neighborhood life.
3. The majority of interviewees appreciate the ability to share Points of the Quarter with others.
4. The graphical interface is considered good by most interviewees.
5. Users aged 60+ with prior knowledge of smartphones and applications find it easy to register, access, and use the application.
